backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a marketplace with product listings (CRUD operations), messaging system between buyers and sellers, and blob storage integration for images. Includes validation, authentication via phone numbers, and conversation management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the OLS logo (IMG-20260223-WA0852.jpg) in the Layout component header, with high confidence and associated test ID REQ-74.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities for a marketplace application with authentication, product listings, messaging, and brand filtering.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom CSS variables defining a warm earth-tone OKLCH color system for light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with protected routes for create listing, edit listing, and profile pages, plus public routes for home and product detail, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BrandFilter.tsx: Horizontal scrollable brand filter component for mobile phone brands (Apple, Samsung, OnePlus, etc.) with multi-select toggle functionality and clear all button.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Horizontal scrollable category filter with icons, displaying categories in custom order (Smartphones first) with an "All Categories" option to clear selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component for real-time messaging between buyers and sellers, with message history, auto-scroll, read receipts, error handling, and send-on-enter functionality.
frontend/src/components/ConversationList: Displays a scrollable list of conversation cards with listing details, phone numbers, last messages, timestamps, and unread counts. Shows an empty state when no conversations exist.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header (logo, navigation, auth buttons), footer with caffeine.ai attribution, and mobile login dialog. Conditionally renders authenticated vs unauthenticated navigation options.
frontend/src/components/MobileLoginDialo: Dialog component for mobile phone number authentication with validation for 10 or 12 digit Indian phone numbers. Handles login submission and displays success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying product listing with image, title, price, category badge, brand (for smartphones), and seller phone number. Includes hover effects and error handling for missing images.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with debounced onChange (300ms delay), clear button, and search icon. Manages local state and syncs with parent component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages ICP backend actor instances based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using @dfinity/auth-client. Manages login state, identity persistence, and provides login/logout functions with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMobileAuth.ts: Zustand store with persistence for mobile phone number authentication. Manages phone number state, login/logout functions, and initialization status with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating product listings, user listings, chat messages, and unread messages. Includes hooks for creating, editing, and deleting listings with image upload support using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm earth-toned color palette (terracotta, sand) for both light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListingPage.tsx: Form page for creating new product listings with fields for title, description, price, category, optional brand (for smartphones), and image upload with validation and preview functionality.
frontend/src/pages/EditListingPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing product listings, pre-populating fields from the current listing data and allowing users to update details or replace the product image.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main marketplace page displaying a hero banner, search bar, category/brand filters, and a grid of product listings with filtering logic and unread message notifications.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page showing full listing information including image, price, description, seller contact, and chat functionality with authentication checks to prevent self-messaging.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile page component with tabs for user's ads and messages, displaying listings with edit/delete actions and conversations grouped by listing and participant with unread counts.
frontend/src/utils/formatPhoneNumber.ts: Utility function that formats phone numbers into Indian format (XXXXX XXXXX) with optional +91 country code handling.
frontend/src/utils/formatPrice.ts: Utility function that formats prices as Indian Rupees (₹) using the Indian numbering system with lakhs and crores.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, border radius variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing an OLX-like Android marketplace app with known issues including chat delivery failures, listing creation problems, and non-functional My Chats interface.
